overview.title: Your Financial Partner
overview.subtitle: From the first invoice to strategic business decisions
overview.description: START HN accounting agency provides professional accounting and financial services designed for entrepreneurs, micro and small enterprises that want accurate, timely and strategically useful information.

accounting.title: Accounting & Bookkeeping Services
accounting.subtitle: Accurate, timely and in compliance with regulations
accounting.description: Managing business books, preparing statutory reports and calculations for companies, sole traders and associations.
features: Managing general ledger and auxiliary records
Preparation of periodic and annual financial reports
Preparation and submission of tax returns
VAT calculation and VAT return submission

tax.title: Tax Tracking & Advisory
tax.subtitle: Compliant and efficient operations
tax.description: We monitor changes in tax regulations and provide advice to help you operate in compliance and efficiently.
features: Tax burden optimization in accordance with the law
Preparation for tax audits and inspections

virtualCfo.title: Virtual CFO for Your Business
virtualCfo.subtitle: Strategic financial support
virtualCfo.description: Strategic financial support through analysis, reports and planning, for companies that want deeper insight into their business.
features: Budget planning and cash flow projections
Report preparation for management and investors
Support in applying for projects and grants

additional.title: Additional Services
items: Cloud-based solutions for secure storage and mobile data access
Support for startups and newly established companies
